calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel R. Stern, Esq., appeared for plaintiff Jones Street Terrace Associates with property manager Richard Rehl.
Defendant Erran Andrews appeared with limited scope attorney Erin Dougherty, Esq.

Settlement Conference Held. Parties entered into signed settlement agreement and stipulation for judgment that was not filed for the property at 729 Jones Street, #108, San Francisco, California. Trial date vacated.

Hon William R. Gargano/Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
